name: initialStress
description: Applied mechanical stress value in megapascals (MPa) at the start of a materials testing experiment.
ExpectedUse: Specification of loading conditions in mechanical testing including creep tests, tensile tests, compression tests, and fatigue experiments where stress control is required.

Properties.Name: initialStress
Properties.Title: Initial Stress
Properties.Description: Applied mechanical stress value in megapascals (MPa) at the start of a materials testing experiment.
